# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud database security.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: cloudsql-postgres-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-7680
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
        pointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
        transactionLogRetentionDays: 7
        backupRetentionSettings:
          retainedBackups: 30
          retentionUnit: COUNT
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        requireSsl: true
        sslMode: ENCRYPTED_ONLY
        authorizedNetworks: []
        privateNetwork: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
      databaseFlags:
      - name: cloudsql.iam_authentication
        value: 'on'
      - name: log_connections
        value: 'on'
      - name: log_disconnections
        value: 'on'
      - name: log_checkpoints
        value: 'on'
      - name: log_lock_waits
        value: 'on'
      activationPolicy: ALWAYS
      availabilityType: REGIONAL
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      dataDiskSizeGb: 100
      maintenanceWindow:
        day: 7
        hour: 3
        updateTrack: stable
      insightsConfig:
        queryInsightsEnabled: true
        queryPlansPerMinute: 5
        queryStringLength: 1024
        recordApplicationTags: true
        recordClientAddress: true
      deletionProtectionEnabled: true

- name: vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: vpc-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- name: private-ip-address
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)

- name: private-vpc-connection
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    parent: services/servicenetworking.googleapis.com
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    reservedPeeringRanges:
    - $(ref.private-ip-address.name)

- name: cloudsql-db-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.cloudsql-postgres-instance.name)
    name: app-user
    type: CLOUD_IAM_SERVICE_ACCOUNT
    host: ""

- name: cloudsql-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.cloudsql-postgres-instance.name)
    name: staging-db
    charset: UTF8

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.cloudsql-postgres-instance.name)
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.cloudsql-postgres-instance.connectionName)
- name: privateIpAddress
  value: $(ref.cloudsql-postgres-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
